fields.narrative_intro: *A sleep-deprived person and a theatrical person discuss DeepSeek V4 at an airport gate where the flight has been delayed 6 hours.*
fields.panel1:
[setup]
SLEEP-DEPRIVED PERSON: "DeepSeek V4-Pro has 1.6 trillion parameters."
fields.panel2:
[build]
THEATRICAL PERSON: "Extraordinary! A titan! An colossus of intellect!"
SLEEP-DEPRIVED PERSON: "Only 49 billion actually turn on."
fields.panel3:
[pivot]
THEATRICAL PERSON: "...that's 3% showing up."
SLEEP-DEPRIVED PERSON: "$1.74 per million tokens. Cheaper than GPT-5.4 Nano."
fields.panel4:
[silent reaction]
[Visual: The theatrical person stares into the middle distance, one hand frozen mid-flourish. Behind them, the departure board still reads DELAYED. A crumpled $500B funding announcement flyer blows across the floor.]
fields.panel5:
[punch]
THEATRICAL PERSON: "So it's a frontier model... on a Spirit Airlines budget."
SLEEP-DEPRIVED PERSON: "About 3 to 6 months behind. Open weights."
fields.panel6:
[button]
[Visual: Both stare at their boarding passes. The gate agent's screen quietly runs DeepSeek V4-Flash. A hand-written sign reads: 'WE ALSO ONLY ACTIVATE 3% AT A TIME.']

narrative_summary: The joke reframes DeepSeek V4's 3%-active Mixture-of-Experts architecture as a relatable 'barely showing up and still competitive' energy, set against the backdrop of a 6-hour delay where budget options are suddenly looking very appealing.
rationale: Candidate 1 earns its punchline most cleanly: the gate agent's handwritten sign 'WE ALSO ONLY ACTIVATE 3% AT A TIME' is a genuinely earned visual callback that ties the MoE architecture joke to the setting without over-explaining it, and the deadpan voice keeps the specific numbers (1.6T params, 49B active, $1.74/M tokens) landing as dry comedy rather than lecture. Candidates 4 and 5 tie on score but 4 over-explains the deflation and 5 muddles speaker attribution in panel 3, giving Candidate 1 the edge on execution.
story_title: DeepSeek V4–almost on the frontier, a fraction of the price
place: at an airport gate where the flight has been delayed 6 hours
